case_title: DONG MEI CHU ET AL VS. JOHN CHOW ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHU, DONG MEI CHU, PETER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHOW, JOHN TSAO-WU, CHOW & YEE LLP AT PLAINTIFFS' REQUEST, PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM AGAINST TSAO-WU, CHOW & YEE, LLP IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHU, DONG MEI CHU, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, JOHN TSAO-WU, CHOW & YEE LLP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS DONG MEI CHU & PETER CHU. LAN THAI WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR MR. & MRS. CHU. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS JOHN CHOW OR TSAO-WU, CHOW & YEE, LLP. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT JOHN CHOW. INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO THE ENTITY DEFENDANT TSAO-WU, CHOW & YEE, LLP. THROUGH THEIR INTERPRETER PLAINTIFFS STATED TO THE COURT THAT THEY WISH TO PROCEED TODAY AGAINST DEFENDANT JOHN CHOW AND DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE THEIR CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT TSO-WU, CHOW & YEE, LLP. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED.. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $120.00 SERVED JUL-14-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, JOHN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED JUL-14-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TSAO-WU, CHOW & YEE LLP
